resume_text:
JOHN DOE
Software Engineer
Email: john.doe@email.com | Phone: (555) 123-4567
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/johndoe | GitHub: github.com/johndoe

SUMMARY
Experienced Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience developing scalable web applications and distributed systems. Proficient in Python, JavaScript, and cloud technologies. Strong background in REST APIs, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines.

EXPERIENCE

Senior Software Engineer | TechCorp Inc. | San Francisco, CA | 2021 - Present
• Developed and maintained microservices architecture serving 1M+ daily users
• Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Docker, reducing deployment time by 60%
• Led a team of 3 junior developers and mentored new hires
• Technologies: Python, Flask, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes

Software Engineer | StartupXYZ | Austin, TX | 2019 - 2021
• Built REST APIs for mobile and web applications using Python and Django
• Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver features on tight deadlines
• Optimized database queries improving application performance by 40%
• Technologies: Python, Django, MySQL, Redis, Git

Junior Developer | DevShop LLC | Austin, TX | 2018 - 2019
• Developed frontend components using React and JavaScript
• Participated in code reviews and followed agile development practices
• Fixed bugs and implemented small features under senior guidance
• Technologies: JavaScript, React, Node.js, MongoDB

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science | University of Texas at Austin | 2018
GPA: 3.8/4.0
Relevant Coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Database Systems, Software Engineering

SKILLS
Programming Languages: Python, JavaScript, Java, Go
Frameworks: Django, Flask, React, Node.js
Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis
Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Git
Other: REST APIs, Microservices, Agile Development, Testing

CERTIFICATIONS
• AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate (2022)
• Docker Certified Associate (2021)

PROJECTS
E-commerce Platform | Personal Project | 2020
• Built a full-stack e-commerce application using Python/Django and React
• Implemented payment processing with Stripe API
• Deployed on AWS using Docker containers
• GitHub: github.com/johndoe/ecommerce-platform
job_details:
About the job
Sydney | Hybrid | Insurance-Tech | SaaS | Up to $160K + Super 

Are you a Senior Java Engineer who thrives on complexity, loves solving deep technical problems, and wants to influence both engineering culture and product direction?

This is a rare opportunity to join a scaling Australian tech company at a pivotal moment — and help shape the future of a mission-critical enterprise platform used across major industries.

 If you’re curious, detail-orientated, and love diving into challenging backend systems (not just surface-level UI), this team will feel like home.

What You’ll Work On
You’ll take ownership of a deeply complex, metadata-driven backend platform — solving large, interesting engineering problems that genuinely move the needle for customers.

Expect to be involved in:
Designing and improving backend architecture
Introducing engineering best practices and new ways of working
Helping scale a maturing platform and development function
Building new features across Java, Groovy, Spring/Guice, JPA/Hibernate
Collaborating with senior engineers, product owners, and principal engineers
Mentoring mid-level devs and influencing broader engineering culture

This isn’t a BAU or feature-factory role — you’ll be joining during a major uplift in platform capability, engineering maturity, and innovation.

About You

You’re someone who enjoys the hard problems and wants more than just building UI components. You love getting into the “why” behind the system, understanding how everything connects, and making things better — technically and culturally.

You’ll thrive here if you:
Have 5+ years’ Java experience, including 2+ at Senior/Lead level
Enjoy complex backend engineering and large-scale system design
Are highly curious and love unpacking how systems work
Can mentor others and act as a role model for engineering excellence
Are comfortable influencing, collaborating, and introducing improvements
Want to join a team where your voice genuinely matters

Tech Stack
Your experience doesn’t need to match everything — but strength across the JVM ecosystem is key.
Java, Groovy
Spring or Guice
Hibernate/JPA
JUnit, Mockito
SQL (SQL Server, Oracle, PostgreSQL)
REST/SOAP APIs
Liquibase
Ant, Maven, Gradle, Git
Tomcat, Wildfly/JBoss
CI/CD pipelines

What’s on Offer
Up to $160K + Super
Flexibility to $170K + Super for exceptional candidates
Hybrid working (Sydney-based)
Join a scaling team with huge technical ownership and influence
Career pathways into Principal Engineer or Tech Lead roles
Real opportunity to shape engineering standards, practices, and culture
A collaborative leadership team with zero micromanagement

How to Apply
If you’re a Senior Java Engineer who wants deeper technical challenge, more influence, and the chance to drive real change in a scaling tech environment — we’d love to speak with you.
📩 Send a message or apply directly to start the conversation (strict confidentiality guaranteed).
prompt:
Answer these employer screening questions professionally and honestly based on the provided resume.
For multiple choice questions, select the most appropriate option that matches the candidate's experience.
For text questions, provide clear, concise answers (1-2 sentences).
Be truthful - if the candidate doesn't have a specific qualification, indicate that politely while highlighting related experience.
